message:
perf: inline JSValueNative dup/free to avoid C FFI (~5% CPU improvement)

Inline ref_count increment in dup() and fast-path decrement in free()
directly in Zig, matching CompressedValue.dupRef/freeRef pattern. Only
calls C JS_FreeValue for actual destruction (ref_count reaches 0).
Eliminates cross-compilation-unit call overhead for the most frequent
operations. Binary grows only 1.5MB (196MB vs 194.5MB).
